title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India:
Hitachi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
